citations.quote: The communal area was in a very clean and tidy condition and we graded it A+.
I wanted to inform you that I did not attend my placement today due to my illness.
the top shelf of my drawer is broken, and I was wondering if someone could come by to fix it
Smoking and vaping are strictly prohibited inside your flat and in any part of the building.
Santander Universities Enterprise Fund is now open to Edinburgh Napier students
We partner with Howden (formerly Endsleigh), the student insurance specialist, to cover your belongings

findings.text: Flat inspection of Castlelaw House Flat 5 on 26/03/2026 found communal area clean (A+ grade) and noted maintenance issues with main door and kitchen door.
Anfal Elbushra emailed placement office on 23/04/2026 reporting absence due to illness.
Anfal Elbushra reported a broken drawer top shelf on 31/10/2025; maintenance was forwarded to Facilities Service Desk.
Smoking/vaping policy reminder sent to Slateford Road residents on 09/02/2026, referencing tenancy agreement Code of Conduct.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Bundle 16 Correlation Summary

**Task:** Correlate bundle 16 facts with arrears timeline

**Sources Reviewed:** NAP-SRC-0024, NAP-SRC-0047, NAP-SRC-0051, NAP-SRC-0060, NAP-SRC-0064, NAP-SRC-0065

**Key Findings:**
- Flat inspection (26/03/2026) shows no arrears-related issues.
- Absence from placement (23/04/2026) is unrelated to accommodation.
- Maintenance request (31/10/2025) is unrelated to arrears.
- Smoking policy reminder (09/02/2026) references tenancy agreement but no arrears.
- Enterprise fund email (08/04/2026) and insurance cover email (07/10/2025) are generic.

**Gap:** No evidence of arrears, payment history, or financial terms. Follow-up task recommended to locate tenancy agreement and account statements.
proposed_artifacts.title: Bundle 16 Correlation Summary

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search matter sources for tenancy agreement, license to occupy, rent schedule, payment receipts, arrears ledger, or any financial correspondence related to Anfal Elbushra's accommodation. If not found, propose a task to request these documents from the client or university.
proposed_tasks.title: Locate financial records and tenancy agreement for arrears timeline

risk_flags.text: Absence of financial records in bundle 16 creates a gap in evidence for any arrears claim; reliance on these sources alone would be insufficient.

summary: Correlated bundle 16 sources with arrears timeline. Found no direct evidence of arrears, payment history, or tenancy terms in the provided sources. Sources cover flat inspection, absence from placement, maintenance request, smoking policy reminder, enterprise fund opportunity, and insurance cover check. None link to accommodation arrears. Proposed follow-up task to locate financial records or tenancy agreements.

uncertainties.text: No source in bundle 16 contains any reference to accommodation arrears, payment amounts, due dates, or financial obligations.
The tenancy agreement or license to occupy is not among the provided sources; arrears cannot be assessed without it.
No payment records, invoices, or account statements are present in the evidence bundle.
